metadata.note: Stable plant-image override layer. Embeds images directly into plant records so the app does not depend on species-images.json fallback for these slugs. Batch 1 also consolidates Pine, Pine needles (tea), and Pine resin (gum) under Pine.

records.notes: Consolidated entry. Pine, Pine needles (tea), and Pine resin (gum) are combined under Pine for the current build so the plant appears once instead of as split duplicate entries.
records.culinary_uses: Pine: The plant to recognize is pine. The edible or practical-use parts covered here include pine nuts, pine needles used for tea, and pine resin or gum used in traditional ways.
records.medicinal_uses: Pine: Traditional medicinal context can include needle tea and resin use. Pine needles (tea) and Pine resin (gum) are folded into this main Pine record for the current build.

records.short_reason: Merged under Pine for the current build.
records.notes: Merged under Pine. Do not show this as a separate plant record.
